sections.paragraph:
verb לחנוך

to inaugurate; educate, train, guide

verb להיחנך

be inaugurated; educated, trained, guided

verb לחנך

to educate, train, guide, bring up

verb חונך (>>חֻנַּךְ)

be educated, trained, guided; inaugurated

verb להתחנך

be educated, trained, guided, brought up

verb לחנך (>>חינך)

to educate, train, guide, bring up
